subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: build project from build.zig

options.description: where to install C header files
control how build errors are printed
continuously rebuild when source files are modified
delay before rebuilding after a file change
search continuously for unit test failures
force full rebuild and report compilation time
override a project from dependency tree

subcommands.name: fetch
subcommands.description: copy a package into global cache and print its hash

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: initialize a Zig package in the current directory

subcommands.name: build-exe
subcommands.description: create executable from source or object files

subcommands.name: build-lib
subcommands.description: create library from source or object files

subcommands.name: build-obj
subcommands.description: create object from source or object files

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: perform unit testing

subcommands.name: test-obj
subcommands.description: create object for unit testing

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: create executable and run immediately

subcommands.name: ast-check
subcommands.description: look for simple compile errors

subcommands.name: fmt
subcommands.description: reformat Zig source

subcommands.name: reduce
subcommands.description: minimize a bug report

subcommands.name: translate-c
subcommands.description: convert C code to Zig code

subcommands.name: ar
subcommands.description: combine object files into static archive

subcommands.name: cc
subcommands.description: use Zig as a drop-in C compiler

subcommands.name: c++
subcommands.description: use Zig as a drop-in C++ compiler

subcommands.name: dlltool
subcommands.description: use Zig as a drop-in dlltool.exe

subcommands.name: lib
subcommands.description: use Zig as a drop-in lib.exe

subcommands.name: objcopy
subcommands.description: manipulate executables and relocatables

subcommands.name: objdump
subcommands.description: print information about executables and relocatables

subcommands.name: ranlib
subcommands.description: use Zig as a drop-in ranlib

subcommands.name: rc
subcommands.description: use Zig as a drop-in rc.exe

subcommands.name: env
subcommands.description: print lib path, std path, cache directory, and version

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: print help and exit

subcommands.name: std
subcommands.description: view standard library documentation in a browser

subcommands.name: libc
subcommands.description: display native libc paths file or validate one

subcommands.name: targets
subcommands.description: list available compilation targets

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: print version number and exit

subcommands.name: zen
subcommands.description: print Zen of Zig and exit
